welcome_msg: 👋 Hello! I'm an AI bot for finding movies. Send me a YouTube link, screenshot, voice message, video note, or just describe the plot in words, and I'll find the movie!
yt_cookies_menu_text: 🍪 YouTube Access Settings Cookies Status: {status} 📖 How to get cookies: 1. Install the Get cookies.txt LOCALLY browser extension. 2. Go to youtube.com and log in. 3. Click on the extension icon and download the .txt file. 4. Click the «📥 Upload file» button below and send it to the bot.
yt_upload_prompt: Send the downloaded cookies.txt file to this chat.
yt_invalid_format: ❌ Invalid format! Please send a file with a .txt extension
prompt_image: Analyze this image and determine which movie, TV series, or cartoon it belongs to.
prompt_audio_video: Listen closely to this audio/video. Identify the movie by dialogue, music, or sounds.
prompt_system_default: Analyze the data and find the name of the movie/series. If you don't know for sure — use search or your knowledge. DATA: {query} OUTPUT STRICTLY AND ONLY THIS BLOCK: Title (Year) Type, Genre: values Description: plot synopsis
proxy_menu_text: 🌐 Proxy Management Current proxy: {proxy} The bot uses a proxy only if ALL keys locally hit their limits ('Last Resort' mode).
proxy_add_prompt: Send the proxy in the format: host:port:user:pass
api_test_text: ⚡ System Testing Select the API keys testing mode:
log_phase_1: 🔍 PHASE 1: Search across all keys (Local + Search)
log_phase_2: 🧠 PHASE 2: Search without Google Search (Local Only)
log_search_fail: ⚠️ Model {model} ran out of SEARCH quota. Marking for Phase 2.
